title: Swiss Voters Set to Reject Stricter Neutrality, Early Poll Shows
description: Swiss voters are set to reject an initiative to strengthen neutrality, according to an early poll, a result that could support keeping up sanctions against Russia.

title: France bans alcohol consumption at music festival events under red heatwave alert
description: The annual Fête de la Musique celebrations draw millions to the streets but the most serious heatwave warnings have been issued for 35 of the country's departments.

title: Backstage at Gorillaz' epic, one-off stadium show: 'The vibe is ridiculous'
description: Damon Albarn, De La Soul and Moonchild Sannelly talk backstage as Gorillaz play their biggest show.

title: Here’s the latest.
Luxury Kushner Project Collides With Albanian Discontent
description: Protests in Albania against plans for a luxury tourist site have become a cause célèbre for opponents of President Trump and his family. But the politics are local.

title: The Women Running Businesses Under Taliban Rules
description: With secondary education and most jobs out of reach, thousands of Afghan women have turned to entrepreneurship as the only path to make money and maintain a social life.

title: U.S. and Iranian Officials to Meet for Peace Talks in Switzerland
description: The next phase of talks to end the war in Iran is expected to begin on Sunday amid fighting in Lebanon and renewed confusion over the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Which teams have qualified for the World Cup 2026 knockouts, round of 32?
description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup knockout stage format, criteria and rules for qualification. Find out who's in and who's out.

title: Egypt coach denies Salah rift before World Cup match against New Zealand
description: 'If he starts ... or if he gets substituted, it's fine - it is his role as a player,' Egypt ‌coach Hossam Hassan says.

title: Room the hero as tiny Curacao earn first World Cup point against Ecuador
description: Eloy Room's incredible goalkeeping helped Curacao make history in a goalless draw in a Group E match in Kansas City.

title: Suspect arrested after anti-Muslim stabbing rampage in Scotland
description: Bystanders captured the moment police arrested a machete-weilding man, suspected of anti-Muslim stabbing rampage.

title: Thai property crackdown: Foreign buyers hit pause on villas as nominee loophole closes
description: Thailand’s crackdown on a loophole that effectively bypasses its restrictions on land ownership by foreigners is causing prospective buyers to delay purchase decisions on luxury villas in resort destinations such as Phuket and Koh Samui, according to agents. Bangkok has stepped up its scrutiny of business and property ownership in the country, with the Department of Business Development (DBD) flagging 11,426 companies on Koh Phangan and Koh Samui where foreigners hold stakes, accounting for...

title: Cross-border biotech deals grow more complex as US targets China investment links
description: Cross-border biotech deals between China and the United States are becoming more complicated and could face a modest slowdown as Washington steps up efforts to restrict investment and technology transfers, according to industry analysts. “There will be more geopolitical scrutiny going forward. This scrutiny may lead to slightly fewer deals than without it,” said Diederik Stadig, senior healthcare economist at ING Research. Despite the growing regulatory hurdles, Stadig said the broader trend of...

title: US-Iran talks to begin in Switzerland as Tehran says it closed Strait of Hormuz
description: The US disputed Iran's claim the waterway is shut, a move Tehran says was a response to Israeli attacks in Lebanon.

title: Vance Heads to Talks as Strait of Hormuz Re-emerges as Point of Tension
description: Vice President JD Vance said he would prioritize nuclear issues and renewed fighting in Lebanon in talks with an Iranian delegation in Switzerland. Shipping in the Strait of Hormuz faced new disruption after Iran’s military said it was closing the waterway.

title: Huge Blaze Ravages Dominican Republic Beach Resort

title: Colby College Is Stepping In to Save a Maine Town After Disaster
description: A new rescuer — Colby College, bankrolled by a construction magnate — will vastly change not just the economics of Port Clyde, Maine, but also its cultural and physical fabric.
